title: Guard against silent invariant drift in governed work objects
summary: Track the risk that work-object states could become ambiguous without explicit contract rules.

lineage.rationale: The milestone calls out silent invariant drift as a bounded control risk.

relationships.notes: The risk was addressed while defining the task contract.

evidence.summary: The milestone brief identifies the risk of invariant drift.
The contract test verifies that invalid governed work objects are rejected.

audit.notes: Bug resolution reviewed through the focused contract test.

scope_summary: Keep governed work object invariants explicit and fail closed.
observed_behavior: Without explicit invariants, work objects could silently accept ambiguous parentage or status drift.
expected_behavior: Governed work object contracts reject ambiguous parentage, invalid lifecycle states, and unresolved resolution states.
reproduction_steps: Load a governed work object fixture.
Change a parent type or lifecycle field to an invalid value.
Validate the fixture and observe the explicit rejection.

resolution.summary: Add canonical invariant rules and validation coverage for governed work objects.
